task:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

**Task 1 — anthropicprinciple.ai doc reorganization:**
Merge `docs/architecture/ARCHITECTURE.md` into `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, move `docs/architecture/SYSTEM.md` to `docs/SYSTEM.md`, delete the originals, and update all active references across the codebase.

**Task 2 — white-hat-label initial scaffold:**
Reconstruct the entire architecture folder system and plan folder structure as a white-label starter project suitable for sharing on GitHub. Referenced `docs/init/setup.txt` for requirements. Create `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, `docs/SYSTEM.md`, full `docs/architecture/` folder with templates, `context/summaries/` for session management, `CLAUDE.md`, and `README.md`. Remove all anthropicprinciple references.

**Task 3 — white-hat-label new files + CLAUDE.md improvement:**
Three new architecture files and a `template-examples/` folder had been manually added (CHECKPOINTS.md, FE-VISUALISATION.md, six-hats.md, and template-examples/ with GEMINI-CONSULTANCY.md, SERVERSIDE.md, STANDARDS.md). Review and genericize all, remove anthropicprinciple references. Improve CLAUDE.md as a cleaner white-label skeleton with TBA markers where appropriate.

**Task 4 — white-hat-label plan system:**
Set up a `docs/plan/` folder based on the anthropicprinciple plan folder structure. Create: a `tasklist.md` template, a `handoff_template.md`, an `example-tasklist.md` showing tasks to set up the starter project, an `example-handoff_date.md` for the same session, and a copy of `plan-rules.md`.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
- White-label boilerplate starter project for AI-assisted (Claude Code) web development
- Conventional Commits git workflow (`type(scope): description`)
- CSS custom properties as single source of truth (`styles/theme.css`)
- Mobile-first responsive design (`min-width` only breakpoints)
-
great. Plz update README.md with summary details of reflective architecture, guardrails and plan system. Include objectives in /docs/init/setup.txt
user_feedback_text: great. Plz update README.md with summary details of reflective architecture, guardrails and plan system. Include objectives in /docs/init/setup.txt

task:
Plz create a HTML base site with homepage based on the structure of Cowork/projects/that-guy-promo/index.html 

Base the content on the README.md file

Set up css files:
<link rel="stylesheet" href="css/global.css?v=20260326"><!-- increment v= on each deploy to bust phone browser cache -->
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/theme.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/desktop.css" media="(min-width: 768px)">

gobal.css:
   1.  Design tokens
   2.  Reset
   3.  Base elements
   4.  Typography
   5.  Layout 
   6.  Header
   7.  Footer
   8.  Basic Navigation
@import url("grid.css");
@import url("utilities.css");
@import url("global-xtra.css");
   1.  Components — Buttons
   2.  Components — Forms
   3.  Components — Alerts
   4.  Components — Tooltips
   5.  Components — Modal / Dialog
   6.  Components — Icons

Theme.css
@import url("svg-variables.css");
   1.  Font (Fredoka via Google Fonts)
   2.  Theme tokens — light / dark (via prefers-color-scheme)
   3.  Global type overrides
   4.  Navigation overrides

Desktop.css 
 - desktop overrides (leave in global css stylesheets using media queries if minor adjustments).


Include some UI controls - accordion, tooltip, modal, buttons
Add /Users/mat/Claudette/Cowork/projects/white-hat-label/docs/build-assets/favicon
